apriori_index: Survival/Self-Expression Values; Emancipative Values Index (Choice sub-dimension); Traditional/Secular-Rational Values
mean of reverse-coded Q60–Q63; report Cronbach's alpha
mean of reverse-coded Q122, Q123, Q125, Q127; report Cronbach's alpha
mean of Q124, Q126, Q128, Q129; report Cronbach's alpha
sum or mean of reverse-coded Q255–Q259; do NOT report alpha as reliability metric—use variance-inflation-factor (VIF) diagnostics for formative indicators instead

derive categorical typology: 0 = native-born respondent with native-born parents, 1 = second-generation (respondent native-born, ≥1 parent foreign-born), 2 = first-generation (respondent foreign-born). Alternatively, count of foreign-born members (respondent + mother + father, range 0–3).
mean(Q161, Q162); report Spearman-Brown coefficient given two-item scale (Cronbach's alpha is equivalent but Spearman-Brown is the preferred reliability estimate for two-item measures)
